roles.title: User Experience Designer
bullets: Designed and refined wireframes and interactive prototypes to support the development of user-centred digital solutions
Conducted and documented user testing sessions, synthesizing feedback to inform design improvements
Collaborated as an active project team member, contributing ideas, design deliverables, and support across multiple projects
Supported AODA accessibility compliance, ensuring designs were inclusive and usable for diverse users

roles.title: Data Labeler
bullets: Identified and labelled raw data to train machine learning models to recognise key information patterns
